title: UK government defers capital gains on certain crypto with ‘no gain, no loss’ approach
summary: The change in tax policy, expected to impact about 700,000 people in the UK, was related to the disposal of crypto in lending and liquidity pools.

title: JCB signs Circle MOU to test stablecoin payments in Japan
summary: The companies will explore using USDC for JCB’s cross-border treasury operations and merchant payments in Japan as regulated stablecoin adoption gains momentum.

title: The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
Bitcoin’s real power is that anyone willing to pay fees can write to the ledger. BIP-110’s backers want to change that for data-heavy transactions. The backlash reveals what’s truly at stake.

title: UK to Defer Capital Gains Tax on DeFi Lending, Liquidity Pool Deposits

title: Global oil prices on track to notch back-to-back rise, remain ‘tethered to the Hormuz narrative’
